final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing photorealistic product shot of a ByteDance employee ID badge, showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, the quiet materiality of a corporate identity object held under clean studio light
Composition: both front and back faces of the badge displayed side by side, slightly angled to reveal depth and surface texture, lanyard clip visible at top
Subject: ByteDance employee ID badge — front face: ByteDance logo, employee name placeholder, employee photo placeholder, job title, department, employee ID number; back face: barcode or QR code, company address, magnetic stripe or access-control strip, fine-print policy text
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray or off-white studio surface, soft shadow beneath the badge
Lighting/mood: diffused soft-box light with a gentle specular highlight tracing the card edge, the honest clarity of a product detail shot
Color palette: ByteDance brand palette — clean white card body with the ByteDance wordmark in black, accent color drawn from the official logo; lanyard in neutral gray
Materials/textures: PVC card stock with a semi-gloss surface, subtle embossed or printed logo, crisp printed text, slight reflective sheen on the card face
Text (verbatim): ByteDance
Constraints: both front and back sides fully visible in one image, badge proportions match standard CR80 ID card (85.6 mm × 54 mm), photorealistic rendering
Avoid: cartoon or flat illustration style, excessive glare obscuring text, floating badge without physical grounding, generic placeholder badge design
